title: wonderland.legacy
description: restores the old entity designs from early wonderland.jar versions
body:
# wonderland.legacy
## the curseforge page can be found [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/wonderland-legacy)

**wonderland.legacy** reverts all the entities back to how they were before wonderland.jar updated them.

some things might not be restored if the originals are missing, but everything that can be has been brought back.

**important:** put this resource pack above mod elements in your resource pack list so it works right.

this is my **first resource pack**, made for anyone playing with wonderland.jar who wants the old designs back.

if you have any questions or notice something missing and want it added, contact **zaneblazed** on Discord.

**_credits to alexander.25.k for helping me find the original designs and for making wonderland.jar itself_**
